changes.reason: Add a distinct Mac Wi-Fi and no-internet troubleshooting canonical article supported by Apple China official sources; existing canonical coverage is limited to iPhone/iPad and device-specific network symptoms.

queries: Mac 连上 Wi-Fi 但不能上网
Mac 无法加入 Wi-Fi 网络
Mac 显示无互联网连接
无法通过 Wi-Fi 接入互联网
无线诊断 Wi-Fi 建议 Mac
私有无线局域网地址 Mac 无法访问互联网
canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles cover iPhone/iPad Wi-Fi, AirPrint discovery, and HomePod network symptoms; none provides a Mac-specific join-vs-internet flow with Wi-Fi Suggestions, Wireless Diagnostics, DHCP renewal, VPN/security software, router settings, and private Wi-Fi address boundaries.
